mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS id, -- 出发站字段加 origin_ 前缀 ss.id AS origin_id, ss.name AS origin_name, ss.code AS origin_code, -- 到达站字段加 destination_ 前缀 se.id AS destination_id, se.name AS destination_name, se.code AS destination_code, -- 其他字段 l.name AS route_name, t.second_class_price AS min_price, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, t.start_time, t.end_time) AS avg_duration -- 返回秒数 FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN line l ON t.line_id = l.id LEFT JOIN station ss ON l.start_station = ss.id LEFT JOIN station se ON l.end_station = se.id WHERE t.is_hot = 1;
select t.id from ticket t where t.is_hot = 1 and date(t.start_time) = #{departureDate}

select t.id as id, tr.id as train_id, tr.name as train_name, tr.code as train_number, ss.id as origin_station_id, ss.name as origin_station_name, ss.code as origin_station_code, se.id as destination_station_id, se.name as destination_station_name, se.code as destination_station_code, t.start_time as start_time, t.end_time as end_time, timestampdiff(SECOND, end_time, start_time) as duration from ticket t left join train tr on t.train_id = tr.id left join line l on t.line_id = l.id left join station ss on ss.id = l.start_station left join station se on se.id = l.end_station where ss.id = #{originStationId} and se.id = #{destinationStationId} and date(start_time) = #{departureDate}

select tr.id as train_id, tr.code as train_code, tr.type as train_type, tr.name as train_name, ss.id as origin_station_id, ss.name as origin_station_name, ss.code as origin_station_code, se.id as destination_station_id, se.name as destination_station_name, se.code as destination_station_code, t.start_time as start_time, t.end_time as end_time, timestampdiff(SECOND, t.end_time, t.start_time) as duration from ticket t left join train tr on t.train_id = tr.id left join line l on t.line_id = l.id left join station ss on l.start_station = ss.id left join station se on l.end_station = se.id where t.id = #{id};

select s.id as stationId, s.name as stationName, s.code as stationCode, st.arrived_time as arrivedTime, st.departTime as departTime, st.stop_duration as stopDuration from ticket t left join stop_stations st on t.id = st.ticket_id left join station s on st.station_id = s.id where t.id = #{id}
SELECT CASE WHEN #{seatType} = 1 THEN first_class_price WHEN #{seatType} = 2 THEN second_class_price ELSE 0 -- 或者其它适当的默认值 END AS selected_price FROM ticket WHERE id = #{ticketId}

select t.id, tr.name as train_number, s1.name as start_station, s2.name as end_station, t.start_time, t.end_time from ticket t left join line l on t.line_id = l.id left join station s1 on l.start_station = s1.id left join station s2 on l.end_station = s2.id left join train tr on t.train_id = tr.id where t.id in
#{id}

select s1.name as start_station, s2.name as end_station, t.start_time, t.end_time, tr.name as train_number from ticket t left join line l on t.line_id = l.id left join station s1 on l.start_station = s1.id left join station s2 on l.end_station = s2.id left join train tr on t.train_id = tr.id where t.id = #{ticketId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket (line_id, train_id, start_time, end_time, status, is_hot, first_class_price, second_class_price, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{lineId}, #{trainId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{isHot}, #{firstClassPrice}, #{secondClassPrice}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET line_id = #{lineId}, train_id = #{trainId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, is_hot = #{isHot}, first_class_price = #{firstClassPrice}, second_class_price = #{secondClassPrice}, updated_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
